offer: For small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual processing causes late payments. We streamline manual invoice tracking instead of manual invoice processing.
problem: manual processing of vendor invoices leads to late payments
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Share insights on Indie Hackers forums
DM outreach to small accounting firms with demo
Engage in community groups sharing accounting tools
try_it: Let users try invoice data entry and payment scheduling on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
Include one-click export for simple reports
